rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANNE D. O'DONNELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/29/2021. 1) Paragraph 5 of the petition does not state whether notice to any entity was required under Probate Code section 9201. 2) The statutory fee base set forth in paragraph 21 of the petition must be reduced by the loss. 3) Was court approval obtained for the two payments reported as "PA Legal Fees" on Schedule C? Did the petitioner retain this attorney? 4) Some disbursements reported on Schedule C were made before letters were issued. Are the payment dates accurate? 5) As to the funeral expenses reported on Schedule C, were creditor claims filed? The disbursement on 11/21/19 appears to be a claim by the petitioner, but no court approval has been obtained. Probate Code sections 9252 and 9000(a)(3). 6) The disbursements to the petitioner's attorneys reported on Schedule C as "Costs" must be itemized. 7) Please provide copies of receipts for the court costs of $76.50 on 2/21/17 & $88.50 on 10/3/19. 8) Schedule C mentions the decedent's "SNT". Was the decedent receiving Medi-Cal benefits? 9) The declaration re retention of bank statements must state that the attorney retains the "original" statements. 10) The proposed order must comply with CRC 7.650(b) re distribution to the supplemental needs trust.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHERINE LYNDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): No petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: LAURENCE B. KNOWLES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, First Accounting of Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/12/2021 at request of counsel. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7].

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/13/2021. 1) DE-115 shows notice being mailed on 2/18/2021 for a 3/8/2021 hearing. 30 days notice required. [Probate Code 851] 2) The 2/22/2021 Supplemental Declaration of Jennifer Herrera alleges attached as exhibit A. There is no exhibit A attached.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAUREEN E. CROWE TRUST DATED JULY 16, 2016
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition: For Removal, Appointment, Or Confirmation Of Trustee; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Damages; To Compel Trust Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/26/21. No more hearing spots available on 3/8/21, a substitute judge will be on the bench on 3/8/21, and the petition should be heard after the motions. Additionally, the only ENDORSED FILED copy of the petitioners' pleadings that has been delivered to the Examiner so far is the petition filed on 10/16/20. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.] The petition does not address how this is the proper venue; it appears that Gregory Crowe resides in Hawaii and James Feilders resides in Canada. It does not appear that all beneficiaries of the trust were listed in the petition. [CRC 7.902.] They did not receive notice. The proofs of service filed on 1/25/21 (no courtesy copies have been received by the Examiner so they were skimmed online) were not the proper form of Notice of Hearing for a petition filed pursuant to Probate Code Section 850.

rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. bond is fixed at $218,000.00. status on close of estate 9/7/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS L. MARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. close of estate set for 6/10/22.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA VALUROSO SAILOR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/05/2021. 1) The petition must be amended to identify the predeceased sibling and his surviving issue at item 8. Notice must be given to the omitted issue. The amendment or amended petition requires new notice including new publication. CRC 7.53(a). 2) The omitted issue must sign bond waivers.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLENN PATRICK VALUROSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/05/2021 to be heard with the related estate (PES-21-304134). A courtesy copy of the supplement must be received by 03/26/2021.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES M. DOAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. close of estate set for 9/6/22.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSANNE CAPALBO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/24/21. No courtesy copies. No proposed order. No proof of service. No Duties & Liabilities (with Confidential Statement). [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7 A. and B., and 14.18 E.] Courtesy copies and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 3/17/21.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TIMOTHY A. CRAMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, subject to $20,000 bond with consent of counsel. No conformed copy of signed order will be returned (no self-addressed stamped envelope provided). Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 08/22/2022. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 09/06/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GARY E. LANZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. status on close 9/7/2022.
